lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Greetings! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a new boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Of course! Which one would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to customise a boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Not a problem. Just let me know which boat you want to customise and I'll get things set up for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to recover a boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Certainly! Let me know which boat you want retrieving and I'll call in a port wizard to teleport it over.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Looks like you have that boat bottled, it's in your Inventory. No need to recover it!

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Looks like you have that boat bottled, it's in your Bank. No need to recover it!

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Right, time to call in the port wizard.

lines.speaker: Port Wizard Perrie/Peter/Petra
lines.text: Another recovery? This won't take long...

lines.speaker: Port Wizard Perrie/Peter/Petra
lines.text: Need a recovery? One moment please...

lines.speaker: Port Wizard Perrie/Peter/Petra
lines.text: Recovery is it? Right, give me a moment...

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: All done! The boat is now docked here at Port Khazard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: All done! The boat is now docked here at Port Khazard. However, I'm afraid that because it was lost at sea, the port wizard won't have been able to recover any fish, salvage, crates or bounty parts from your

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: cargo hold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I see. Thanks anyway.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: All done! The boat is now docked here at Port Khazard. However, I'm afraid that because it had capsized, the port wizard won't have been able to recover any fish, salvage, crates or bounty parts from

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: your cargo hold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I see. Thanks anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to destroy a boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Yes, I can sort that for you. We love a bit of free scrap here.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: There you go. Your boat has been broken up into scrap.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, thanks.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't help you with that at the moment. You'll have to come back later.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Greetings! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: I'm a shipwright. I supply boats of all kinds to anyone with the money to afford them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting... Would I be able to buy one?

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Sorry, but I don't have any ready for sale right now. I'm sure I will soon, so keep checking back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, fair enough.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't help you with that at the moment. You'll have to come back later.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Greetings! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting... Would I be able to buy one?

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sarah
lines.text: Sorry, but I don't have any ready for sale right now. I'm sure I will soon, so keep checking back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, fair enough.
